examples: The agency recently opened a Zag office in New York.
Zag quickly devised new packaging and got it into stores overnight.
BBH, a global advertising firm, has set up a unit called Zag, which designs, markets and distributes its own products.
Those who choose the slope hop and zig-zag across and down, as if they're skiing.
The Bank of England has predicted the UK will "zig-zag" in and out of growth.
